title: Herobrine: Forgotten
description: A presence is in your world...
body:
(This mod will create text files on your computer and potentially crash your game, this mod is harmless and will not harm your computer) **Something** is in your world.. you keep see something, things spawn that you don't **remember** building. You can **crucifix** it, but the result might not be what you wanted... What are demons harmed by? **Holy water**, and where is holy water found? **Churches** but, there aren't many left, they are mostly found in **plains** though, and holy water is almost non existent. You will need to get **iron sticks** crafted from iron bars, and put the holy water and iron sticks in a cross shape to craft, "**The Cross**"![he's always watching](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEgKnQM39T6oKAIRA-7H5UkhFzBbxaIO0ZnUTM1TC8jDA94t2gOT5IH8jbfS42qtzJk5RLgAcMStXfP6FVeKgux1Ygcy1ochbmb2MkHdmr6OJJm1NOHYbtGfvAJ8uYmcZ_EK_moD-WYx4AlBhW4DS4lIJoCAl0AZZ9oAysBA1kGBdnwmZ0jAyDcpEIWaLCbQ)
He looks _shy_, but he isn't. He will capture you. **Don't do it.**
![you won't know he's there](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEjY2S9HB6lcDG1HeG5PB6YzMpylvAjDuyUbJd2ESEXERsx5p8-JUR2hTDuqd4EjFRYXScLJTCOvxYA4NX_S2OhTXmoNPPJVosLzk18CWVMDOAbQdcNKNaRpZmlBB3xiTsYSFRb8230kfINMVqqjMq2VMDRJS97z0755OI3yBqJyst_CoInsJKMONARzONUB)
Maybe this link will help for a "sign" https://www.dcode.fr/caesar-cipher
(If you have any questions or bug reports, please email at diegoibarra0902@gmail.com)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The Church contains holy water which is needed to craft the cross and four iron sticks which is crafted from 3 iron ingots. Put those into a cross shape and you have the cross, right click on Herobrine when he appears.

![Iron Stick](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEh2bqgX6FRn9fx-LwQNzJ6_Ilr-JXQDnrn3lBOl62w6fIFSONu29cahaWDjOLXuw1-gatVrKHsFHGFalvN2FwrCY6f6eF6VRJjRxVEc62f2coFItszwJ1pi-uDaExhmYS0-TipZqojnkZ7oDDihq7sOWITLwO0KJzKdpolq--pTgc1c_Z2zjiucQXAv0u3T)

![The Cross](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEjGqAxj36vi-qpjpKk6VucVMjnCQK9K7S3oS0yR9P4lyz9hMcRggtN0Ogg7er6TltdkgNdK79h0jysdl9rZ1WFGMMEa3VYSr-efvZlqIaXnncRwWNybtrYCBqe-ZyW8za6LA1YAW08K35jaGCOSwMBnzU0YNTUWcKMCg1vb8L3oYlcHyXw2pz2Si3mLgRJs)

</details>
